name: Portrait photo
prompt: professional portrait photo of a person, soft natural lighting, shallow depth of field, 85mm lens, detailed skin texture
negative_prompt: cartoon, illustration, blurry, low quality, deformed

name: Landscape
prompt: breathtaking landscape, golden hour, dramatic clouds, ultra detailed, cinematic composition
negative_prompt: people, text, watermark, low quality, oversaturated

name: Product shot
prompt: studio product photo on white background, soft shadows, commercial photography, sharp focus
negative_prompt: cluttered background, blurry, low quality, distorted

name: Fantasy character
prompt: fantasy character concept art, detailed armor, dynamic pose, painterly style, dramatic lighting
negative_prompt: photorealistic, blurry, low quality, extra limbs
